Luan Yushuai, a courier from China, has qualified to participate in the marathon at the 2024 Paris Olympics. In preparation for the Paris Olympics, he maintains a daily two-hour training routine and runs 300-400 kilometers every month. He has been dubbed China's "fastest courier" by social media users.
